# Issue Report 1
1. cover screen of level 0 should have both chapter name and the picture. Now the picture covers the full screen that the chapter name is barely visible.
2. in chapter 0, the text render is placed at the left of the screen without margin. which makes it:
    - on desktop, a large part on the right is empty.
    - on mobile platform, zero margin for four borders, look crowded.
3. The menu in chapter 0 should be aligned vertically, to make it easy to read.
4. when attributes change in chapter 0, should show a floating popup presenting the change. 
5. The summary screen is too narrow vertically.
6. Text in chapter 0 is too small to read.
